headline: FedEx (FDX) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Swings And Strong One Year Return
summary: FedEx (FDX) is back in focus after recent trading left the stock with a one day return of about 2.8% and a past week decline near 3.7%, prompting fresh interest in its valuation. See our latest analysis for FedEx. Those short term moves sit within a stronger trend, with a 30 day share price return of 5.64% and a 90 day share price return of 36.12%. The 1 year total shareholder return of 53.00% points to momentum that has been building rather than fading as FedEx reshapes expectations around...

headline: Airlines in bear market as oil poses ‘existential’ threat
summary: The S&P Supercomposite Airlines Industry Index closed down 4.1% on Friday afternoon, extending a skid into a sixth day.  The sharp decline in shares stems from the Iran conflict, which has caused the prices of jet fuel to surge.  Analysts worry that prices could stay high for some time as war in the Middle East drags on.

headline: Costco Earnings Beat Expectations as Membership Model Shines
summary: Fiscal second-quarter results topped analyst estimates for both profit and revenue. Sustained growth in comparable-store sales suggests the retailer is successfully shaking off last year’s slump.
